============================

.. py:module:: pyepo.model.grb.shortestpath

   Shortest path problem

Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: shortestPathModel(grid: tuple[int, int])

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.grb.grbmodel.optGrbModel`


   This class is an optimization model for the shortest path problem

   :ivar _model: Gurobi model
   :vartype _model: GurobiPy model
   :ivar grid: Size of grid network
   :vartype grid: tuple of int
   :ivar arcs: List of arcs

   :vartype arcs: list


   .. py:attribute:: grid


   .. py:attribute:: arcs
      :value: []



.. py:data:: cost
